title: Stormforge: Never Ending Rain
description: A questing, lightweight, tech, skyblock modpack. With over 500+ recipe changes using kubejs!
body:
## Stormforge: Never Ending Rain!

  A lightweight tech focused skyblock modpack (no magic at all), with one objective: to stop the rain. How? That's up to you, by following the linear questline. Taking through mods like actually additions, industrial forgoing, POWAH! and tinkers... With 7 chapters of quests, alongside many additions just for stormforge (like chests, items, recipe types among many others!

Stormforge doesn't have its own discord, but it has its own channel on the [MPD Discord Server](https://discord.gg/kJJUPEPJuP)(minecraft pack development discord), please report any issues (pack isn't perfected nor playtested so ssome quests ARE and COULD be impossible)
<details>
<summary>More info!</summary>

![Pack Promo Page Thing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Mclf6Juw/images/7c4feed7dda4947c9eca507a20fcdee0ed9f9abf.png)

</details>




## What are you waiting for? Get playing or scram outa this page!
